overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player entering a retro-futuristic diner with checkered floors and neon lighting, navigating through the interior past patrons and a waitress, then exiting onto an industrial city street dominated by elevated highways, steam vents, and factory buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner entrance vestibule with checkered floor

events.description: opens green metal door and steps from city street into diner interior

agents.ego_description: opening the green metal door and stepping into the retro-futuristic diner with checkered flooring

entered.detail: metal green door with silver handle and frame
illuminated vertical menu display with food items and prices
blue and white checkered tile flooring throughout diner
curved metallic bar counter with red and white trim
exposed industrial ventilation ducts and pipes on ceiling

segments.scene_description: The clip begins outside a green metal door with an illuminated menu board. The player opens the door and enters a narrow diner vestibule, transitioning from outdoor to indoor space. The checkered floor and curved bar counter become visible as the camera moves into the artificial lighting of the retro-futuristic establishment.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner main floor with booths and bar seating

events.description: dialogue interaction options appear for speaking with the waitress

agents.ego_description: walking through the main dining area past booths and bar stools, approaching a waitress in a yellow uniform

notable_agents.action: waitress in yellow uniform and pink boots walking toward the counter
patron with red hair sitting at booth near the window

entered.detail: blue upholstered booth seating with white tables
rotating ceiling fans with integrated lighting
large circular illuminated clock hanging above the bar
flag with stars and stripes mounted on the wall
tall stools lined along the curved bar counter

segments.scene_description: Moving through the main dining area, the camera passes blue upholstered booths on the left and a curved bar on the right. A waitress in a yellow uniform walks through the space while patrons sit at tables. Dialogue options appear on screen indicating an interaction point. The environment features warm yellow walls, checkered flooring, and industrial ceiling fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner exit area with large street-facing windows

events.description: exits the diner through the green door back onto the city street

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit while observing the industrial street scene through the diner windows

entered.detail: large curved window showing industrial buildings and street outside

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the diner exit, passing the last row of booths. Through the large street-facing windows, the industrial cityscape with elevated highways becomes visible. The green door approaches as the camera prepares to transition back to the outdoor environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial city street with elevated highways and factory buildings

events.description: green sports car and black truck drive past on the multi-lane street
turns right to follow sidewalk alongside the industrial building wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk next to industrial buildings, observing traffic and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
black truck driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive brown industrial complex with steam vents and metal piping
elevated highway structure with curved metal support beams
concrete pedestrian walkway with red painted curb
tall palm trees planted along the street median
large industrial exhaust pipes emitting white steam

segments.scene_description: Exiting the diner, the scene opens into a wide industrial city street with elevated highways overhead. The camera walks along the sidewalk next to a massive factory building with steam vents and graffiti-covered walls. Vehicles including a green sports car and black truck pass by on the road while pedestrians walk ahead on the sidewalk. The environment features a mix of industrial architecture and urban infrastructure under clear afternoon skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a retro-futuristic diner out into a sprawling industrial cityscape. It begins by passing through a green metal door and a narrow vestibule, where the outdoor light gives way to the artificial glow of a checkered floor and a curved bar counter. As the camera glides through the main dining area, it passes blue upholstered booths and a waitress in a yellow uniform before moving toward the exit. The scene then shifts as the view through large street-facing windows reveals an urban horizon, leading the camera back through the green door and into the open air. Finally, the environment expands into a wide city street dominated by elevated highways, steam vents, and massive factory buildings under clear afternoon skies.
